---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: hero-wrapper
::: hero-text
# Connor Conkey-Morrison

::: hero-tags
[PhD Candidate]{.tag} [Provisional Psychologist]{.tag} [Sessional Academic]{.tag}
:::

::: hero-bio
I am a PhD candidate at RMIT University (School of Health and Biomedical Sciences). I also work as a provisional psychologist, and sessional academic at RMIT University and the Cairnmillar Institute.
:::
:::

::: hero-photo
![Connor Conkey-Morrison](images/crop_27A5334.jpg){.profile-img}
:::
:::

---

::: stats-strip
::: stat-item
**6**\
Papers in progress
:::

::: stat-item
**4**\
Peer-reviewed publications
:::

::: stat-item
**2024–2027**\
Active PhD period
:::

::: stat-item
**PROSPERO**\
Systematic review registered
:::
:::

::: about-section
## Current focus

I research school attendance problems and emotionally based school avoidance (EBSA) — why children disengage from school, what interventions work, and how disengagement develops across childhood and adolescence. My work combines systematic review methods, longitudinal cohort modelling, and population-level education data.

::: hero-links
[Research →](pages/research.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-primary} [Education & Experience →](pages/history.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-secondary} [Get in touch →](pages/contact.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::

---

## Recent reading

```{=html}
<div id="home-reading-list"><p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--text-muted);">Loading…</p></div>
<p style="margin-top:0.75rem;"><a href="pages/research.qmd#recent-reading" style="font-size:0.875rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--accent);text-decoration:none;">View all →</a></p>

<script>
(async function() {
  const MAX = 3;
  const container = document.getElementById('home-reading-list');

  function getBookSvg() {
    const c = (window.CCM_COLORS && window.CCM_COLORS.accent) || '#c05a4a';
    return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2z"/><path d="M22 3h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z"/></svg>`;
  }

  let entries = [];
  try {
    const res = await fetch('data/reading.json');
    entries = await res.json();
  } catch {
    container.innerHTML = '';
    return;
  }

  const shown = entries.slice(0, MAX);

  async function fetchMeta(doi) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`https://api.crossref.org/works/${encodeURIComponent(doi)}?mailto=connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com`);
      if (!res.ok) return null;
      const data = await res.json();
      const w = data.message;
      const authors = (w.author || []).slice(0, 3).map(a => {
        const last = a.family || '';
        const init = a.given ? a.given[0] + '.' : '';
        return `${last}, ${init}`.trim().replace(/,$/, '');
      }).join(', ') + ((w.author || []).length > 3 ? ', et al.' : '');
      return {
        title: w.title?.[0] || 'Untitled',
        journal: w['container-title']?.[0] || '',
        year: w.published?.['date-parts']?.[0]?.[0] || '',
        authors,
        url: `https://doi.org/${doi}`,
      };
    } catch { return null; }
  }

  const metas = await Promise.all(shown.map(e => fetchMeta(e.doi)));

  const html = shown.map((e, i) => {
    const meta = metas[i];
    const url = meta ? meta.url : `https://doi.org/${e.doi}`;
    const title = meta ? meta.title : e.doi;
    const byline = meta ? [meta.authors, meta.year, meta.journal].filter(Boolean).join(' · ') : '';
    return `
      <div class="pub-entry-block">
        <div class="pub-favicon-fallback">${getBookSvg()}</div>
        <div class="pub-entry-text">
          <a href="${url}" target="_blank" class="pub-title-link">${title}</a>
          ${byline ? `<div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.2rem;font-style:italic;">${byline}</div>` : ''}
          ${e.note ? `<div style="font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.35rem;line-height:1.6;">${e.note}</div>` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>`;
  }).join('');

  container.innerHTML = html || '<p style="font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--text-muted);">Nothing here yet.</p>';
})();
</script>
```
